title: Melissitus zaprjagaevii
taxonomy: Melissitus zaprjagaevii is classified as a species of bee in the family Apidae. The genus Melissitus is a group of small to medium-sized bees known to be solitary. The classification of Melissitus zaprjagaevii falls under the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, and class Insecta. Within the class Insecta, it belongs to the order Hymenoptera. This classification provides a broad categorization of the plant's biological relationships.
